items.summary: Redesign the 'Get in Touch' / CTA section on the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) to exactly match the uploaded screenshot (image-2.png): solid golden yellow (#f5c518) full-width background, large bold dark navy (#0a1628) heading 'Ready to Start Your Business Journey?' using the same Poppins/Inter font as the rest of the site, a subtitle in dark navy 'Get expert guidance today — 100% free consultation, no obligations', three horizontally-arranged CTA buttons: (1) 'Get Free Consultation' with a phone icon on dark navy (#0a1628) background with white text, (2) 'Call: +91 8102906339 / 9279242122' with a phone icon on dark navy (#0a1628) background with white text — where the call button links to tel:9279242122, (3) 'WhatsApp Us' with a WhatsApp/message icon on green (#22c55e) background with white text linking to https://wa.me/918102906339 opening in a new tab, and three trust badge lines below the buttons: '✓ No registration fee', '✓ Expert advice', '✓ Response within 30 minutes' in dark navy text. All text, fonts, and button styles must be consistent with the rest of the site (Poppins/Inter font family). The section must be fully responsive — buttons stack vertically on mobile screens < 640px. Do not alter any other section on the Home page.
